stemHtml: Receiver Autonomous Integrity Monitoring (RAIM) is a method used to ensure the integrity of navigational data. With GNSS, this is achieved by…

options.a: checking the consistency of the range measurements from a group of at least five satellites.
options.b: using information from additional on-board sensors such as the Inertial Reference System (IRS)
options.c: averaging the position solutions obtained from five satellites.
options.d: applying the ionospheric and atmospheric corrections to the range measurements from satellites.
